entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Tropical wetland rice used in the study

entities.name: PHILIPPINES
entities.description: Country where the wetland rice soils were sourced

entities.name: WETLAND
entities.description: Environmental condition of the rice soils

entities.name: CARBON DIOXIDE
entities.description: Gas evolved during distillation that causes measurement error

entities.name: DIRECT STEAM DISTILLATION
entities.description: Process used to determine ammonium in soil suspensions

entities.name: AEROBIC
entities.description: Soil condition where CO2 error was negligible

entities.name: ANAEROBIC
entities.description: Soil condition where CO2 error was higher and significant

entities.name: MAGNESIUM OXIDE
entities.description: Reagent used during the direct distillation process

entities.name: AMMONIUM
entities.description: The chemical species (NH4+) being determined in the soil

entities.name: SULFURIC ACID
entities.description: Reagent used to absorb ammonia and eliminate CO2 error through boiling

entities.name: BORIC ACID
entities.description: Reagent used to absorb ammonia that failed to eliminate CO2 error

entities.name: POTASSIUM CHLORIDE
entities.description: Reagent present during the direct distillation of soil suspensions
